chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal 444 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Main Case. 2. For hearing of CMA 5690/2023. 16.12.2025 Mr. Azain Nadeem, advocate holds brief for Mr. Mohsin Kadir Shahwani, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Hafeez Ullah, advocate for respondent 2. Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for respondent 5. Under instructions, learned counsel for the appellant does not press the present High Court Appeal, which is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
